{"code":"prs = github.list_pull_requests(state="open")

# Filter for PRs with > 400 additions and no Linear issue closed
filtered_prs = [
    p for p in prs
    if p.additions > 400 and not p.closes_linear
]

# Count by repo
repo_counts = {}
for p in filtered_prs:
    repo = p.repo
    repo_counts[repo] = repo_counts.get(repo, 0) + 1

# Find PR with maximum additions
max_additions…(+218)
